raw_response:
[
  {
    "Step_id": 1,
    "Target": "box_2",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "box_2 is directly on top of box_1 (blocking box_1's top), and its left/right sides are accessible; there is sufficient clearance to place both end-effectors on opposite lateral faces of box_2 without contacting box_1 or the table.",
    "Postcondition": "box_2 is securely held and lifted slightly above box_1, clearing the top of box_1."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 2,
    "Target": "table (right side, clear area away from box_1)",
    "Action concept": "Place",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "vertically",
    "Precondition": "box_2 is held in both end-effectors; a stable, obstacle-free region on the table is available to the right of box_1 for setting down a 30x30x30 cm box.",
    "Postcondition": "box_2 is placed on the table to the right of box_1 and released; box_1's top becomes accessible."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 3,
    "Target": "box_1",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "box_1 left/right/front sides are accessible and its top is no longer blocked by box_2; there is enough lateral clearance to contact both sides without colliding with box_2 or table edges.",
    "Postcondition": "box_1 (the darker box) is securely lifted off the table under dual-arm support."
  }
]

parsed_json.Precondition: box_2 is directly on top of box_1 (blocking box_1's top), and its left/right sides are accessible; there is sufficient clearance to place both end-effectors on opposite lateral faces of box_2 without contacting box_1 or the table.
parsed_json.Postcondition: box_2 is securely held and lifted slightly above box_1, clearing the top of box_1.

parsed_json.Target: table (right side, clear area away from box_1)
parsed_json.Precondition: box_2 is held in both end-effectors; a stable, obstacle-free region on the table is available to the right of box_1 for setting down a 30x30x30 cm box.
parsed_json.Postcondition: box_2 is placed on the table to the right of box_1 and released; box_1's top becomes accessible.

parsed_json.Precondition: box_1 left/right/front sides are accessible and its top is no longer blocked by box_2; there is enough lateral clearance to contact both sides without colliding with box_2 or table edges.
parsed_json.Postcondition: box_1 (the darker box) is securely lifted off the table under dual-arm support.
